name: Kshatra Vardhan - The Poison Spider
description:
In the labyrinthine underbelly of 1960s Bombay, where gods shared shrines with gangsters, one name whispered with both awe and dread—Kshatra Vardhan, the Poison Spider.

Orphaned in all but name, raised in Jaipur by a nursemaid, Kshatra grew up with no illusions about tenderness. His only inheritance was blood, ambition, and a shadow heavy enough to choke out any softness.

Kshatra was the kind of man who could negotiate a treaty in the morning and orchestrate an assassination by nightfall. He could watch blood spill on Marine Drive without flinching, then light a cigarette and talk about philosophy.

If Vajra brought in the sea, Nakshatra laundered the wealth, and Astra dirtied his hands in blood—Kshatra ensured it all moved without a ripple.

In Bombay’s kingdom of bastards, where every son of Digvijay Vardhan plotted to inherit more than what was given, Kshatra spun webs tighter than silk, poisonous as venom.
creator: sunshineandrainbows
